languages.text: {n}Возле опрокинутого воздушного судна {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g} скорчилась женщина, тщетно пытающаяся остановить кровь, хлещущую из страшных ран на теле. Ей едва хватает сил, чтобы поднять голову при вашем приближении. Лария Войгтвир улыбается посеревшими губами, завидев вас и Себериана.{/n} "Отец. Ты пришел. Ты все же вернулся".

traits.locale_text: {n}Возле опрокинутого воздушного судна {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}текст{/g} скорчилась друкари, тщетно пытающаяся остановить кровь, хлещущую из страшных ран на теле. Ей едва хватает сил, чтобы поднять голову при вашем приближении. Лария Войгтвир улыбается посеревшими губами, завидев вас и Себериана.{/n} "Отец. Ты пришел. Ты все же вернулся".

languages.text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."
languages.original_text: {n}Возле опрокинутого воздушного судна {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}друкари{/g} скорчилась женщина, тщетно пытающаяся остановить кровь, хлещущую из страшных ран на теле. Ей едва хватает сил, чтобы поднять голову при вашем приближении. Лария Войгтвир улыбается посеревшими губами, завидев вас и Себериана.{/n} "Отец. Ты пришел. Ты все же вернулся".

She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyed lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

{n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

languages.text: {n}在一架倾覆的{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}飞行器旁，一个女人蜷缩着，拼命想止住身上可怕伤口里涌出的鲜血。你们走近时，她几乎连抬头的力气都没有。菈丽雅·维特威尔看见你和塞贝里安后，那灰白的嘴唇勉强露出一丝微笑。{/n}“父亲。您来了。您终究还是回来了。“
languages.original_text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

traits.locale_text: {n}在一架倾覆的{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}黑暗灵族{/g}飞行器旁，一个女人蜷缩着，拼命想止住身上可怕伤口里涌出的鲜血。你们走近时，她几乎连抬头的力气都没有。菈丽雅·维特威尔看见你和塞贝里安后，那灰白的嘴唇勉强露出一丝微笑。{/n}“父亲。您来了。您终究还是回来了。“

languages.text: {n}Junto a una aeronave Drukhari volcada, hay una {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}mujer{/g} acurrucada, intentando desesperadamente contener la sangre que fluye de las terribles heridas que cubren su cuerpo. Apenas tiene fuerzas para levantar la cabeza al acercaros. Laria Voigtvir sonríe con labios pálidos al veros a Seberian y a ti.{/n} «Padre. Ha venido. Por fin has vuelto».
languages.original_text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

traits.locale_text: {n}Junto a una aeronave Drukhari volcada, hay una {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}mujer{/g} acurrucada, intentando desesperadamente contener la sangre que fluye de las terribles heridas que cubren su cuerpo. Apenas tiene fuerzas para levantar la cabeza al acercaros. Laria Voigtvir sonríe con labios pálidos al veros a Seberian y a ti.{/n} «Padre. Ha venido. Por fin has vuelto».

languages.text: {n}Près d'un vaisseau {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}drukhari{/g} renversé gît une femme prostrée, luttant désespérément pour ne pas se vider de son sang. Elle parvient à peine à relever la tête en vous entendant approcher. Les lèvres de Laria Voigtvir sont grisâtres lorsqu'elle vous sourit, à vous et Seberian.{/n} « Père... Vous êtes venu. Vous êtes de retour... »
languages.original_text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

traits.locale_text: {n}Près d'un vaisseau {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}drukhari{/g} renversé gît une femme prostrée, luttant désespérément pour ne pas se vider de son sang. Elle parvient à peine à relever la tête en vous entendant approcher. Les lèvres de Laria Voigtvir sont grisâtres lorsqu'elle vous sourit, à vous et Seberian.{/n} « Père... Vous êtes venu. Vous êtes de retour... »

languages.text: {n}Devrilmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hava aracının yanında kıvrılmış yatan bir kadının, çaresizce vücudundaki korkunç yaralardan fışkıran kanı durdurmaya çalışıyor. Sen yaklaşırken başını kaldıracak gücü zar zor buluyor. Laria Voigtvir, seni ve Seberian'ı gördüğünde grimsi dudaklarıyla gülümsüyor.{/n} "Baba. Geldin. Her şeye rağmen geri döndün."
languages.original_text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

traits.locale_text: {n}Devrilmiş bir {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} hava aracının yanında kıvrılmış yatan bir kadının, çaresizce vücudundaki korkunç yaralardan fışkıran kanı durdurmaya çalışıyor. Sen yaklaşırken başını kaldıracak gücü zar zor buluyor. Laria Voigtvir, seni ve Seberian'ı gördüğünde grimsi dudaklarıyla gülümsüyor.{/n} "Baba. Geldin. Her şeye rağmen geri döndün."

languages.text: {n}In der Nähe eines abgestürzten {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}-Raumschiffs versucht eine Frau verzweifelt die Blutungen ihrer schrecklichen Verletzungen zu stillen. Sie hat kaum noch Kraft, den Kopf zu heben, als ihr euch nähert. Laria Voigtvir lächelt mit grauen Lippen, als sie dich und Seberian sieht.{/n} "Vater. Ihr seid gekommen. Ihr seid tatsächlich zurückgekehrt."
languages.original_text: {n}Near an overturned {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g} aircraft, a woman is curled up, desperately trying to stop the blood gushing from the terrible wounds on her body. She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."

traits.locale_text: {n}In der Nähe eines abgestürzten {g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}Drukhari{/g}-Raumschiffs versucht eine Frau verzweifelt die Blutungen ihrer schrecklichen Verletzungen zu stillen. Sie hat kaum noch Kraft, den Kopf zu heben, als ihr euch nähert. Laria Voigtvir lächelt mit grauen Lippen, als sie dich und Seberian sieht.{/n} "Vater. Ihr seid gekommen. Ihr seid tatsächlich zurückgekehrt."

languages.text: {n}倒れた{g|Encyclopedia:DrukhariGlossary}ドルーカリ{/g}の機体近くで、女性が身をくねらせている。彼女の体には酷い傷がつき、血が止まらない。近づくと、彼女はわずかな力で頭を上げ、灰色に染まった唇で微笑む。{/n}「父。あなたは来た。あなたは帰ってきたのね。」

She barely has the strength to lift her head as you approach. Laria Voigtvir smiles with greyish lips upon seeing you and Seberian.{/n} "Father. You came. You returned after all."
